name: factory
description: Codex plugin for engineering workflow, review, and knowledge compounding.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, build, review, ship, and compound engineering work in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Factory packages ten engineering workflow skills, four internal reviewer and researcher personas, and a coordinated full-development command for Codex. The bundle lives at plugins/factory, is registered through .agents/plugins/marketplace.json, and preserves the Factory knowledge loop, iron laws, and verification discipline with Codex-native plugin structure and subagent workflows.
